description_long: This kiosk is a long, narrow structure with a rectangular profile and a low, horizontal orientation. The exterior is decorated with a continuous mural or painted scene featuring trees, people, and buildings, giving it a lively and inviting appearance. The structure appears to be made primarily of painted wood or composite panels, with a flat roof and no visible windows or doors from the provided views. The mural wraps around the front and rear faces, while the sides are plain and much narrower. The kiosk is likely intended for use as a decorative or informational booth in a park or urban setting, rather than as a fully enclosed retail space. Its compact and elongated form suggests it is designed for placement along a sidewalk or open plaza.
description: A long, narrow kiosk with a painted mural exterior, flat roof, and no visible windows or doors. The structure is decorative and likely used as an informational or display booth.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the kiosk with a detailed mural featuring trees and people.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the kiosk's very thin profile and plain, undecorated surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the mural continuing along the length of the kiosk, similar to the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and lack of decoration.
attribute_signage_type: painted mural integrated into structure, continuous along front and rear faces, no visible text
attribute_roof_design: flat roof, appears to be made of the same material as the walls, no overhangs or decorative elements
attribute_architectural_style: decorative, mural-based, with traditional and illustrative influences
